CustomField.description: When true, CostCalculatorService returns zero USD and zero Flex Credits for this model rather than billing per call. Use for Salesforce-internal classifiers (e.g. EinsteinHyperClassifier, EinsteinTextEval) that do not consume customer Flex Credits per the public rate card. Unmetered rows are also ineligible for use as the default fallback.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Tick for models that do not consume Flex Credits (internal Salesforce classifiers, etc.). Cost calculations skip these rows entirely.
CustomField.label: Is Unmetered
